name: Performapal Longphone Bull
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ロングフォーン・ブル
desc: If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Performapal" monster from your Deck to your hand, except a Pendulum Monster. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Longphone Bull" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Performapal" monster from your Deck to your hand, except a Pendulum Monster. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Longphone Bull" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Performapal" monster from your Deck to your hand, except a Pendulum Monster. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Longphone Bull" once per turn.
